title: fix(siglip2): improve pooled output logic in modular file
body:
This PR focuses on stabilizing and clarifying the pooled output pathways in modular_siglip2.py. It aims to ensure consistent generation of pooler_output for the vision encoder, align pooling semantics across the pooling head and vision transformer, and solidify how pooled representations are used in the multimodal fusion path (image-text logits). The changes are internal to the Siglip2 modular implementation and should preserve the public API while reducing shape/aggregation edge-cases when varying image sizes or pooling configurations are used. No user-facing API changes are expected, but the pooling behavior will be more robust and predictable across forward passes.

Key aspects addressed:
- Consistent pooler_output creation in Siglip2VisionTransformer and Siglip2VisionModel
- Harmonized pooling path in Siglip2MultiheadAttentionPoolingHead and Siglip2Model
- Safer and more stable logits computation by keeping embeddings normalized and ensuring deterministic pooling outputs
- Guarding 4D attention mask compatibility and handling optional pooler usage

If tests exist for Siglip2 pooling, they should continue to pass; this PR focuses on internal pooling consistency and robustness rather than new features.

step_plan.summary: This PR stabilizes and unifies the pooled output pathway inside modular_siglip2.py by making the vision embedding/transformer pooling deterministic across varying input sizes, propagating pooler_output consistently, and aligning the multimodal fusion and image-classification paths to use compatible, normalized pooled representations.

steps.reason: Make interpolation/padding robust for variable spatial shapes, ensure dtype/device handling, and guard edge cases so positional embeddings align with pooled outputs
steps.side_effects: May affect memory usage due to additional temporary tensors; tests may need adjustments for edge-case shapes; keeps API behavior intact

steps.operation: Tighten Siglip2VisionEmbeddings.forward to align with new positional embeddings
steps.reason: Ensure patch embeddings and resized positional embeddings are combined correctly across varying image sizes and spatial shapes
steps.side_effects: Potential minor shape broadcasting changes; downstream pooling remains compatible if implemented correctly

steps.operation: Ensure pooler_output is created in Siglip2VisionTransformer.forward with robust 4D mask handling
steps.reason: Guarantee deterministic pooler_output generation when a pooling head is used and handle 4D attention masks gracefully across variable input sizes
steps.side_effects: May alter pooler_output presence in some edge cases; tests relying on exact masking behavior may need adjustment

steps.operation: Propagate and preserve pooler_output through Siglip2VisionModel.forward
steps.reason: Ensure downstream pooling paths consistently receive pooler_output and avoid drops when a head is configured
steps.side_effects: Potential API expectations for vision model outputs may shift if pooler_output handling changes; downstream tests may need minor updates

steps.operation: Stabilize Siglip2MultiheadAttentionPoolingHead.forward to produce (B, D) with a clear fallback
steps.reason: Provide a stable pooled representation that matches the vision pooler_output dimension, with a deterministic fallback when no attention mask is provided
steps.side_effects: Output shape and values may change in masking scenarios; downstream components relying on pooling outputs should remain compatible

steps.operation: Normalize and stabilize image features in Siglip2Model.get_image_features
steps.reason: Return a consistent, normalized pooled feature for image embeddings to support cosine-similarity logits
steps.side_effects: May affect classifier logits slightly; ensure no division-by-zero and maintain numerical stability

steps.operation: Align Siglip2Model.forward to use normalized pooled embeddings for fusion logits
steps.reason: Ensure consistent normalization and stable scaling across the multimodal fusion path and logits computation
steps.side_effects: Minor changes to logits or their scaling; tests should remain stable if shapes are unchanged

steps.operation: Harmonize pooling path in Siglip2ForImageClassification.forward with other pooled representations
steps.reason: Align mean/masked pooling approach with pooled outputs used elsewhere to avoid incompatible feature shapes for the classifier head
steps.side_effects: Classifier outputs may shift slightly; ensure tests validate both shape and non-NaN outputs
